#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
字幕合并视频工具
将 SRT 字幕硬编码到视频中，生成带字幕的新视频
"""

import argparse
import os
import sys
import subprocess
import time
import re


def get_video_info(video_path):
    """获取视频信息"""
    cmd = [
        "ffprobe",
        "-v",
        "error",
        "-select_streams",
        "v:0",
        "-show_entries",
        "stream=width,height,duration",
        "-of",
        "csv=p=0",
        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        parts = result.stdout.strip().split(",")
        if len(parts) >= 3:
            return {
                "width": int(parts[0]),
                "height": int(parts[1]),
                "duration": float(parts[2]) if parts[2] else 0,
            }
    except:
        pass
    return None


def get_video_duration(video_path):
    """获取视频时长"""
    cmd = [
        "ffprobe",
        "-v",
        "error",
        "-show_entries",
        "format=duration",
        "-of",
        "default=noprint_wrappers=1:nokey=1",
        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        return float(result.stdout.strip())
    except:
        return 0


def merge_subtitle(
    video_path,
    subtitle_path,
    output_path,
    font_size=24,
    font_color="white",
    outline_color="black",
    outline_width=2,
    position="bottom",
    margin_v=30,
):
    """
    合并字幕到视频

    Args:
        video_path: 输入视频路径
        subtitle_path: 字幕文件路径
        output_path: 输出视频路径
        font_size: 字体大小
        font_color: 字体颜色
        outline_color: 描边颜色
        outline_width: 描边宽度
        position: 字幕位置 (bottom/top)
        margin_v: 垂直边距
    """

    # 字幕位置
    alignment = (
        2 if position == "bottom" else 6
    )  # ASS alignment: 2=底部居中, 6=顶部居中

    # 构建 subtitles 滤镜
    # 使用绝对路径并转义特殊字符
    subtitle_path_escaped = subtitle_path.replace(":", "\\:").replace("'", "\\'")

    # 字幕样式
    style = f"FontSize={font_size},PrimaryColour=&H00FFFFFF,OutlineColour=&H00000000,Outline={outline_width},MarginV={margin_v},Alignment={alignment}"

    subtitle_filter = f"subtitles='{subtitle_path_escaped}':force_style='{style}'"

    # FFmpeg 命令
    cmd = [
        "ffmpeg",
        "-i",
        video_path,
        "-vf",
        subtitle_filter,
        "-c:v",
        "libx264",
        "-preset",
        "medium",
        "-crf",
        "23",
        "-c:a",
        "copy",
        "-y",  # 覆盖输出文件
        output_path,
    ]

    return cmd


def run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration):
    """运行 FFmpeg 并显示进度"""

    # 添加进度输出参数
    cmd_with_progress = cmd[:-1] + ["-progress", "pipe:1", cmd[-1]]

    process = subprocess.Popen(
        cmd_with_progress,
        stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
        stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
        universal_newlines=True,
    )

    print(f"\n合并进度:")

    current_time = 0
    while True:
        line = process.stdout.readline()
        if not line and process.poll() is not None:
            break

        if line.startswith("out_time_ms="):
            try:
                time_ms = int(line.split("=")[1])
                current_time = time_ms / 1000000
                if duration > 0:
                    progress = min(100, (current_time / duration) * 100)
                    bar_len = 40
                    filled = int(bar_len * progress / 100)
                    bar = "█" * filled + "░" * (bar_len - filled)
                    print(
                        f"\r[{bar}] {progress:.1f}% ({current_time:.1f}s / {duration:.1f}s)",
                        end="",
                        flush=True,
                    )
            except:
                pass

    print()  # 换行

    # 等待进程结束
    process.wait()

    return process.returncode


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="字幕合并视频工具 - 将 SRT 字幕硬编码到视频中"
    )
    parser.add_argument("input", help="输入视频文件路径")
    parser.add_argument("-s", "--subtitle", required=True, help="SRT 字幕文件路径")
    parser.add_argument("-o", "--output", help="输出视频文件路径")
    parser.add_argument(
        "-d", "--dir", dest="output_dir", help="输出目录（默认: 与输入视频同目录）"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--font-size", type=int, default=24, help="字幕字体大小（默认: 24）"
    )
    parser.add_argument("--font-color", default="white", help="字幕颜色（默认: white）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--outline", type=int, default=2, help="字幕描边宽度（默认: 2）"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--position",
        default="bottom",
        choices=["bottom", "top"],
        help="字幕位置（默认: bottom）",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--margin", type=int, default=30, help="字幕边距（默认: 30）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "-q",
        "--quality",
        type=int,
        default=23,
        choices=range(18, 29),
        metavar="18-28",
        help="视频质量 CRF 值，越小质量越高（默认: 23）",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--preset",
        default="medium",
        choices=[
            "ultrafast",
            "superfast",
            "veryfast",
            "faster",
            "fast",
            "medium",
            "slow",
            "slower",
            "veryslow",
        ],
        help="编码速度预设（默认: medium）",
    )

    args = parser.parse_args()

    # 检查输入文件
    if not os.path.exists(args.input):
        print(f"错误: 视频文件不存在: {args.input}")
        sys.exit(1)

    if not os.path.exists(args.subtitle):
        print(f"错误: 字幕文件不存在: {args.subtitle}")
        sys.exit(1)

    # 确定输出路径
    if args.output:
        output_file = args.output
    elif args.output_dir:
        os.makedirs(args.output_dir, exist_ok=True)
        base_name = os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(args.input))[0]
        output_file = os.path.join(args.output_dir, f"{base_name}_subtitled.mp4")
    else:
        base_name = os.path.splitext(args.input)[0]
        output_file = f"{base_name}_subtitled.mp4"

    # 获取视频信息
    duration = get_video_duration(args.input)
    video_info = get_video_info(args.input)

    print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")
    print(f"  字幕合并视频工具")
    print(f"{'=' * 60}")
    print(f"输入视频: {os.path.basename(args.input)}")
    print(f"字幕文件: {os.path.basename(args.subtitle)}")
    if video_info:
        print(f"视频分辨率: {video_info['width']}x{video_info['height']}")
    if duration > 0:
        print(f"视频时长: {int(duration // 60)}分{int(duration % 60)}秒")
    print(f"字幕字号: {args.font_size}")
    print(f"字幕位置: {args.position}")
    print(f"编码质量: CRF {args.quality}")
    print(f"编码速度: {args.preset}")
print(f"输出文件: {output_file}")
    print(f"{'=' * 60}")

    # 构建 FFmpeg 命令 - 简化路径处理
    subtitle_path = os.path.abspath(args.subtitle)
    input_path = os.path.abspath(args.input)

    # 字幕位置
    alignment = 2 if args.position == "bottom" else 6

    # 字幕样式
    style = f"FontSize={args.font_size},PrimaryColour=&H00FFFFFF,OutlineColour=&H00000000,Outline={args.outline},MarginV={args.margin},Alignment={alignment}"

    subtitle_filter = f"subtitles={subtitle_path}:force_style='{style}'"

    cmd = [
        "ffmpeg",
        "-i",
        input_path,
        "-vf",
        subtitle_filter,
        "-c:v",
        "libx264",
        "-preset",
        args.preset,
        "-crf",
        str(args.quality),
        "-c:a",
        "copy",
        "-y",
        output_file,
    ]

    print(f"\n开始合并...")
    start_time = time.time()

    # 运行 FFmpeg
    returncode = run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration)

    if returncode == 0:
        elapsed = time.time() - start_time
        output_size = os.path.getsize(output_file) / (1024 * 1024)  # MB

        print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")
        print(f"  完成!")
        print(f"  输出文件: {output_file}")
        print(f"  文件大小: {output_size:.1f} MB")
        print(f"  总耗时: {elapsed:.1f}秒 ({elapsed / 60:.1f}分钟)")
        print(f"{'=' * 60}")
    else:
        print(f"\n错误: FFmpeg 执行失败，返回码: {returncode}")
        print("请检查输入文件和字幕文件是否正确")
        sys.exit(1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
字幕合并视频工具
将 SRT 字幕硬编码到视频中，生成带字幕的新视频
"""

import argparse
import os
import sys
import subprocess
import time
import re


def get_video_info(video_path):
    """获取视频信息"""
    cmd = [
        "ffprobe",
        "-v",
        "error",
        "-select_streams",
        "v:0",
        "-show_entries",
        "stream=width,height,duration",
        "-of",
        "csv=p=0",
        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        parts = result.stdout.strip().split(",")
        if len(parts) >= 3:
            return {
                "width": int(parts[0]),
                "height": int(parts[1]),
                "duration": float(parts[2]) if parts[2] else 0,
            }
    except:
        pass
    return None


def get_video_duration(video_path):
    """获取视频时长"""
    cmd = [
        "ffprobe",
        "-v",
        "error",
        "-show_entries",
        "format=duration",
        "-of",
        "default=noprint_wrappers=1:nokey=1",
        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        return float(result.stdout.strip())
    except:
        return 0


def merge_subtitle(
    video_path,
    subtitle_path,
    output_path,
    font_size=24,
    font_color="white",
    outline_color="black",
    outline_width=2,
    position="bottom",
    margin_v=30,
):
    """
    合并字幕到视频

    Args:
        video_path: 输入视频路径
        subtitle_path: 字幕文件路径
        output_path: 输出视频路径
        font_size: 字体大小
        font_color: 字体颜色
        outline_color: 描边颜色
        outline_width: 描边宽度
        position: 字幕位置 (bottom/top)
        margin_v: 垂直边距
    """

    # 字幕位置
    alignment = (
        2 if position == "bottom" else 6
    )  # ASS alignment: 2=底部居中, 6=顶部居中

    # 构建 subtitles 滤镜
    # 使用绝对路径并转义特殊字符
    subtitle_path_escaped = subtitle_path.replace(":", "\\:").replace("'", "\\'")

    # 字幕样式
    style = f"FontSize={font_size},PrimaryColour=&H00FFFFFF,OutlineColour=&H00000000,Outline={outline_width},MarginV={margin_v},Alignment={alignment}"

    subtitle_filter = f"subtitles='{subtitle_path_escaped}':force_style='{style}'"

    # FFmpeg 命令
    cmd = [
        "ffmpeg",
        "-i",
        video_path,
        "-vf",
        subtitle_filter,
        "-c:v",
        "libx264",
        "-preset",
        "medium",
        "-crf",
        "23",
        "-c:a",
        "copy",
        "-y",  # 覆盖输出文件
        output_path,
    ]

    return cmd


def run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration):
    """运行 FFmpeg 并显示进度"""

    # 添加进度输出参数
    cmd_with_progress = cmd[:-1] + ["-progress", "pipe:1", cmd[-1]]

    process = subprocess.Popen(
        cmd_with_progress,
        stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
        stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
        universal_newlines=True,
    )

    print(f"\n合并进度:")

    current_time = 0
    while True:
        line = process.stdout.readline()
        if not line and process.poll() is not None:
            break

        if line.startswith("out_time_ms="):
            try:
                time_ms = int(line.split("=")[1])
                current_time = time_ms / 1000000
                if duration > 0:
                    progress = min(100, (current_time / duration) * 100)
                    bar_len = 40
                    filled = int(bar_len * progress / 100)
                    bar = "█" * filled + "░" * (bar_len - filled)
                    print(
                        f"\r[{bar}] {progress:.1f}% ({current_time:.1f}s / {duration:.1f}s)",
                        end="",
                        flush=True,
                    )
            except:
                pass

    print()  # 换行

    # 等待进程结束
    process.wait()

    return process.returncode


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="字幕合并视频工具 - 将 SRT 字幕硬编码到视频中"
    )
    parser.add_argument("input", help="输入视频文件路径")
    parser.add_argument("-s", "--subtitle", required=True, help="SRT 字幕文件路径")
    parser.add_argument("-o", "--output", help="输出视频文件路径")
    parser.add_argument(
        "-d", "--dir", dest="output_dir", help="输出目录（默认: 与输入视频同目录）"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--font-size", type=int, default=24, help="字幕字体大小（默认: 24）"
    )
    parser.add_argument("--font-color", default="white", help="字幕颜色（默认: white）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--outline", type=int, default=2, help="字幕描边宽度（默认: 2）"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--position",
        default="bottom",
        choices=["bottom", "top"],
        help="字幕位置（默认: bottom）",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--margin", type=int, default=30, help="字幕边距（默认: 30）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "-q",
        "--quality",
        type=int,
        default=23,
        choices=range(18, 29),
        metavar="18-28",
        help="视频质量 CRF 值，越小质量越高（默认: 23）",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--preset",
        default="medium",
        choices=[
            "ultrafast",
            "superfast",
            "veryfast",
            "faster",
            "fast",
            "medium",
            "slow",
            "slower",
            "veryslow",
        ],
        help="编码速度预设（默认: medium）",
    )

    args = parser.parse_args()

    # 检查输入文件
    if not os.path.exists(args.input):
        print(f"错误: 视频文件不存在: {args.input}")
        sys.exit(1)

    if not os.path.exists(args.subtitle):
        print(f"错误: 字幕文件不存在: {args.subtitle}")
        sys.exit(1)

    # 确定输出路径
    if args.output:
        output_file = args.output
    elif args.output_dir:
        os.makedirs(args.output_dir, exist_ok=True)
        base_name = os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(args.input))[0]
        output_file = os.path.join(args.output_dir, f"{base_name}_subtitled.mp4")
    else:
        base_name = os.path.splitext(args.input)[0]
        output_file = f"{base_name}_subtitled.mp4"

    # 获取视频信息
    duration = get_video_duration(args.input)
    video_info = get_video_info(args.input)

    print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")
    print(f"  字幕合并视频工具")
    print(f"{'=' * 60}")
    print(f"输入视频: {os.path.basename(args.input)}")
    print(f"字幕文件: {os.path.basename(args.subtitle)}")
    if video_info:
        print(f"视频分辨率: {video_info['width']}x{video_info['height']}")
    if duration > 0:
        print(f"视频时长: {int(duration // 60)}分{int(duration % 60)}秒")
    print(f"字幕字号: {args.font_size}")
    print(f"字幕位置: {args.position}")
    print(f"编码质量: CRF {args.quality}")
    print(f"编码速度: {args.preset}")
print(f"输出文件: {output_file}")
    print(f"{'=' * 60}")

    # 构建 FFmpeg 命令 - 简化路径处理
    subtitle_path = os.path.abspath(args.subtitle)
    input_path = os.path.abspath(args.input)

    # 字幕位置
    alignment = 2 if args.position == "bottom" else 6

    # 字幕样式
    style = f"FontSize={args.font_size},PrimaryColour=&H00FFFFFF,OutlineColour=&H00000000,Outline={args.outline},MarginV={args.margin},Alignment={alignment}"

    subtitle_filter = f"subtitles={subtitle_path}:force_style='{style}'"

    cmd = [
        "ffmpeg",
        "-i",
        input_path,
        "-vf",
        subtitle_filter,
        "-c:v",
        "libx264",
        "-preset",
        args.preset,
        "-crf",
        str(args.quality),
        "-c:a",
        "copy",
        "-y",
        output_file,
    ]

    print(f"\n开始合并...")
    start_time = time.time()

    # 运行 FFmpeg
    returncode = run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration)

    if returncode == 0:
        elapsed = time.time() - start_time
        output_size = os.path.getsize(output_file) / (1024 * 1024)  # MB

        print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")
        print(f"  完成!")
        print(f"  输出文件: {output_file}")
        print(f"  文件大小: {output_size:.1f} MB")
        print(f"  总耗时: {elapsed:.1f}秒 ({elapsed / 60:.1f}分钟)")
        print(f"{'=' * 60}")
    else:
        print(f"\n错误: FFmpeg 执行失败，返回码: {returncode}")
        print("请检查输入文件和字幕文件是否正确")
        sys.exit(1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""

将 SRT 字幕硬编码到视频中，生成带字幕的新视频
"""

import argparse
import os
import sys
import subprocess
import time
import re


def get_video_info(video_path):
    """获取视频信息"""
    cmd = [
        "ffprobe",
        "-v",
        "error",
        "-select_streams",
        "v:0",
        "-show_entries",
        "stream=width,height,duration",
        "-of",
        "csv=p=0",
        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        parts = result.stdout.strip().split(",")
        if len(parts) >= 3:
            return {
                "width": int(parts[0]),

    except:
        pass
    return None

        "-v",

        "-show_entries",

        "-of",

        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        return float(result.stdout.strip())
    except:
        return 0


def merge_subtitle(
    video_path,
    subtitle_path,
    output_path,
    font_size=24,
    font_color="white",
    outline_color="black",
    outline_width=2,

    margin_v=30,

        "-c:a",

        output_path,
    ]

def run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration):

    if not os.path.exists(args.subtitle):

        output_file = os.path.join(args.output_dir, f"{base_name}_subtitled.mp4")

        base_name = os.path.splitext(args.input)[0]

    print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
字幕合并视频工具
将 SRT 字幕硬编码到视频中，生成带字幕的新视频
"""

import argparse
import os
import sys
import subprocess
import time
import re


def get_video_info(video_path):
    """获取视频信息"""
    cmd = [
        "ffprobe",
        "-v",
        "error",
        "-select_streams",
        "v:0",
        "-show_entries",
        "stream=width,height,duration",
        "-of",
        "csv=p=0",
        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        parts = result.stdout.strip().split(",")
        if len(parts) >= 3:
            return {
                "width": int(parts[0]),
                "height": int(parts[1]),
                "duration": float(parts[2]) if parts[2] else 0,
            }
    except:
        pass
    return None


def get_video_duration(video_path):
    """获取视频时长"""
    cmd = [
        "ffprobe",
        "-v",
        "error",
        "-show_entries",
        "format=duration",
        "-of",
        "default=noprint_wrappers=1:nokey=1",
        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        return float(result.stdout.strip())
    except:
        return 0


def merge_subtitle(
    video_path,
    subtitle_path,
    output_path,
    font_size=24,
    font_color="white",
    outline_color="black",
    outline_width=2,
    position="bottom",
    margin_v=30,
):
    """
    合并字幕到视频

    Args:
        video_path: 输入视频路径
        subtitle_path: 字幕文件路径
        output_path: 输出视频路径
        font_size: 字体大小
        font_color: 字体颜色
        outline_color: 描边颜色
        outline_width: 描边宽度
        position: 字幕位置 (bottom/top)
        margin_v: 垂直边距
    """

    # 字幕位置
    alignment = (
        2 if position == "bottom" else 6
    )  # ASS alignment: 2=底部居中, 6=顶部居中

    # 构建 subtitles 滤镜
    # 使用绝对路径并转义特殊字符
    subtitle_path_escaped = subtitle_path.replace(":", "\\:").replace("'", "\\'")

    # 字幕样式
    style = f"FontSize={font_size},PrimaryColour=&H00FFFFFF,OutlineColour=&H00000000,Outline={outline_width},MarginV={margin_v},Alignment={alignment}"

    subtitle_filter = f"subtitles='{subtitle_path_escaped}':force_style='{style}'"

    # FFmpeg 命令
    cmd = [
        "ffmpeg",
        "-i",
        video_path,
        "-vf",
        subtitle_filter,
        "-c:v",
        "libx264",
        "-preset",
        "medium",
        "-crf",
        "23",
        "-c:a",
        "copy",
        "-y",  # 覆盖输出文件
        output_path,
    ]

    return cmd


def run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration):
    """运行 FFmpeg 并显示进度"""

    # 添加进度输出参数
    cmd_with_progress = cmd[:-1] + ["-progress", "pipe:1", cmd[-1]]

    process = subprocess.Popen(
        cmd_with_progress,
        stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
        stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
        universal_newlines=True,
    )

    print(f"\n合并进度:")

    current_time = 0
    while True:
        line = process.stdout.readline()
        if not line and process.poll() is not None:
            break

        if line.startswith("out_time_ms="):
            try:
                time_ms = int(line.split("=")[1])
                current_time = time_ms / 1000000
                if duration > 0:
                    progress = min(100, (current_time / duration) * 100)
                    bar_len = 40
                    filled = int(bar_len * progress / 100)
                    bar = "█" * filled + "░" * (bar_len - filled)
                    print(
                        f"\r[{bar}] {progress:.1f}% ({current_time:.1f}s / {duration:.1f}s)",
                        end="",
                        flush=True,
                    )
            except:
                pass

    print()  # 换行

    # 等待进程结束
    process.wait()

    return process.returncode


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="字幕合并视频工具 - 将 SRT 字幕硬编码到视频中"
    )
    parser.add_argument("input", help="输入视频文件路径")
    parser.add_argument("-s", "--subtitle", required=True, help="SRT 字幕文件路径")
    parser.add_argument("-o", "--output", help="输出视频文件路径")
    parser.add_argument(
        "-d", "--dir", dest="output_dir", help="输出目录（默认: 与输入视频同目录）"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--font-size", type=int, default=24, help="字幕字体大小（默认: 24）"
    )
    parser.add_argument("--font-color", default="white", help="字幕颜色（默认: white）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--outline", type=int, default=2, help="字幕描边宽度（默认: 2）"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--position",
        default="bottom",
        choices=["bottom", "top"],
        help="字幕位置（默认: bottom）",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--margin", type=int, default=30, help="字幕边距（默认: 30）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "-q",
        "--quality",
        type=int,
        default=23,
        choices=range(18, 29),
        metavar="18-28",
        help="视频质量 CRF 值，越小质量越高（默认: 23）",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--preset",
        default="medium",
        choices=[
            "ultrafast",
            "superfast",
            "veryfast",
            "faster",
            "fast",
            "medium",
            "slow",
            "slower",
            "veryslow",
        ],
        help="编码速度预设（默认: medium）",
    )

    args = parser.parse_args()

    # 检查输入文件
    if not os.path.exists(args.input):
        print(f"错误: 视频文件不存在: {args.input}")
        sys.exit(1)

    if not os.path.exists(args.subtitle):
        print(f"错误: 字幕文件不存在: {args.subtitle}")
        sys.exit(1)

    # 确定输出路径
    if args.output:
        output_file = args.output
    elif args.output_dir:
        os.makedirs(args.output_dir, exist_ok=True)
        base_name = os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(args.input))[0]
        output_file = os.path.join(args.output_dir, f"{base_name}_subtitled.mp4")
    else:
        base_name = os.path.splitext(args.input)[0]
        output_file = f"{base_name}_subtitled.mp4"

    # 获取视频信息
    duration = get_video_duration(args.input)
    video_info = get_video_info(args.input)

    print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")
    print(f"  字幕合并视频工具")
    print(f"{'=' * 60}")
    print(f"输入视频: {os.path.basename(args.input)}")
    print(f"字幕文件: {os.path.basename(args.subtitle)}")
    if video_info:
        print(f"视频分辨率: {video_info['width']}x{video_info['height']}")
    if duration > 0:
        print(f"视频时长: {int(duration // 60)}分{int(duration % 60)}秒")
    print(f"字幕字号: {args.font_size}")
    print(f"字幕位置: {args.position}")
    print(f"编码质量: CRF {args.quality}")
    print(f"编码速度: {args.preset}")
    print(f"输出文件: {output_file}")
    print(f"{'=' * 60}")

    # 构建 FFmpeg 命令 - 简化路径处理
    subtitle_path = os.path.abspath(args.subtitle)
    input_path = os.path.abspath(args.input)

    # 字幕位置
    alignment = 2 if args.position == "bottom" else 6

    # 字幕样式
    style = f"FontSize={args.font_size},PrimaryColour=&H00FFFFFF,OutlineColour=&H00000000,Outline={args.outline},MarginV={args.margin},Alignment={alignment}"

    subtitle_filter = f"subtitles={subtitle_path}:force_style='{style}'"

    cmd = [
        "ffmpeg",
        "-i",
        input_path,
        "-vf",
        subtitle_filter,
        "-c:v",
        "libx264",
        "-preset",
        args.preset,
        "-crf",
        str(args.quality),
        "-c:a",
        "copy",
        "-y",
        output_file,
    ]

    print(f"\n开始合并...")
    start_time = time.time()

    # 运行 FFmpeg
    returncode = run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration)

    if returncode == 0:
        elapsed = time.time() - start_time
        output_size = os.path.getsize(output_file) / (1024 * 1024)  # MB

        print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")
        print(f"  完成!")
        print(f"  输出文件: {output_file}")
        print(f"  文件大小: {output_size:.1f} MB")
        print(f"  总耗时: {elapsed:.1f}秒 ({elapsed / 60:.1f}分钟)")
        print(f"{'=' * 60}")
    else:
        print(f"\n错误: FFmpeg 执行失败，返回码: {returncode}")
        print("请检查输入文件和字幕文件是否正确")
        sys.exit(1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

input.oldString:
def run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration):
    """运行 FFmpeg 并显示进度"""

    # 添加进度输出参数
    cmd_with_progress = cmd[:-1] + ["-progress", "pipe:1", cmd[-1]]

    process = subprocess.Popen(
        cmd_with_progress,
        stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
        stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
        universal_newlines=True,
    )

    print(f"\n合并进度:")

    current_time = 0
    while True:
        line = process.stdout.readline()
        if not line and process.poll() is not None:
            break

        if line.startswith("out_time_ms="):
            try:
                time_ms = int(line.split("=")[1])
                current_time = time_ms / 1000000
                if duration > 0:
                    progress = min(100, (current_time / duration) * 100)
                    bar_len = 40
                    filled = int(bar_len * progress / 100)
                    bar = "█" * filled + "░" * (bar_len - filled)
                    print(
                        f"\r[{bar}] {progress:.1f}% ({current_time:.1f}s / {duration:.1f}s)",
                        end="",
                        flush=True,
                    )
            except:
                pass

    print()  # 换行

    # 等待进程结束
    process.wait()

    return process.returncode

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
字幕合并视频工具
将 SRT 字幕硬编码到视频中，生成带字幕的新视频
"""

import argparse
import os
import sys
import subprocess
import time
import re


def get_video_info(video_path):
    """获取视频信息"""
    cmd = [
        "ffprobe",
        "-v",
        "error",
        "-select_streams",
        "v:0",
        "-show_entries",
        "stream=width,height,duration",
        "-of",
        "csv=p=0",
        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        parts = result.stdout.strip().split(",")
        if len(parts) >= 3:
            return {
                "width": int(parts[0]),
                "height": int(parts[1]),
                "duration": float(parts[2]) if parts[2] else 0,
            }
    except:
        pass
    return None


def get_video_duration(video_path):
    """获取视频时长"""
    cmd = [
        "ffprobe",
        "-v",
        "error",
        "-show_entries",
        "format=duration",
        "-of",
        "default=noprint_wrappers=1:nokey=1",
        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        return float(result.stdout.strip())
    except:
        return 0


def merge_subtitle(
    video_path,
    subtitle_path,
    output_path,
    font_size=24,
    font_color="white",
    outline_color="black",
    outline_width=2,
    position="bottom",
    margin_v=30,
):
    """
    合并字幕到视频

    Args:
        video_path: 输入视频路径
        subtitle_path: 字幕文件路径
        output_path: 输出视频路径
        font_size: 字体大小
        font_color: 字体颜色
        outline_color: 描边颜色
        outline_width: 描边宽度
        position: 字幕位置 (bottom/top)
        margin_v: 垂直边距
    """

    # 字幕位置
    alignment = (
        2 if position == "bottom" else 6
    )  # ASS alignment: 2=底部居中, 6=顶部居中

    # 构建 subtitles 滤镜
    # 使用绝对路径并转义特殊字符
    subtitle_path_escaped = subtitle_path.replace(":", "\\:").replace("'", "\\'")

    # 字幕样式
    style = f"FontSize={font_size},PrimaryColour=&H00FFFFFF,OutlineColour=&H00000000,Outline={outline_width},MarginV={margin_v},Alignment={alignment}"

    subtitle_filter = f"subtitles='{subtitle_path_escaped}':force_style='{style}'"

    # FFmpeg 命令
    cmd = [
        "ffmpeg",
        "-i",
        video_path,
        "-vf",
        subtitle_filter,
        "-c:v",
        "libx264",
        "-preset",
        "medium",
        "-crf",
        "23",
        "-c:a",
        "copy",
        "-y",  # 覆盖输出文件
        output_path,
    ]

    return cmd


def run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration):
    """运行 FFmpeg 并显示进度"""

    # 添加进度输出参数
    cmd_with_progress = cmd[:-1] + ["-progress", "pipe:1", cmd[-1]]

    process = subprocess.Popen(
        cmd_with_progress,
        stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
        stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
        universal_newlines=True,
    )

    print(f"\n合并进度:")

    current_time = 0
    while True:
        line = process.stdout.readline()
        if not line and process.poll() is not None:
            break

        if line.startswith("out_time_ms="):
            try:
                time_ms = int(line.split("=")[1])
                current_time = time_ms / 1000000
                if duration > 0:
                    progress = min(100, (current_time / duration) * 100)
                    bar_len = 40
                    filled = int(bar_len * progress / 100)
                    bar = "█" * filled + "░" * (bar_len - filled)
                    print(
                        f"\r[{bar}] {progress:.1f}% ({current_time:.1f}s / {duration:.1f}s)",
                        end="",
                        flush=True,
                    )
            except:
                pass

    print()  # 换行

    # 等待进程结束
    process.wait()

    return process.returncode


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="字幕合并视频工具 - 将 SRT 字幕硬编码到视频中"
    )
    parser.add_argument("input", help="输入视频文件路径")
    parser.add_argument("-s", "--subtitle", required=True, help="SRT 字幕文件路径")
    parser.add_argument("-o", "--output", help="输出视频文件路径")
    parser.add_argument(
        "-d", "--dir", dest="output_dir", help="输出目录（默认: 与输入视频同目录）"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--font-size", type=int, default=24, help="字幕字体大小（默认: 24）"
    )
    parser.add_argument("--font-color", default="white", help="字幕颜色（默认: white）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--outline", type=int, default=2, help="字幕描边宽度（默认: 2）"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--position",
        default="bottom",
        choices=["bottom", "top"],
        help="字幕位置（默认: bottom）",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--margin", type=int, default=30, help="字幕边距（默认: 30）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "-q",
        "--quality",
        type=int,
        default=23,
        choices=range(18, 29),
        metavar="18-28",
        help="视频质量 CRF 值，越小质量越高（默认: 23）",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--preset",
        default="medium",
        choices=[
            "ultrafast",
            "superfast",
            "veryfast",
            "faster",
            "fast",
            "medium",
            "slow",
            "slower",
            "veryslow",
        ],
        help="编码速度预设（默认: medium）",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "-v", "--verbose", action="store_true", help="显示 FFmpeg 详细输出"
    )

    args = parser.parse_args()

    # 检查输入文件
    if not os.path.exists(args.input):
        print(f"错误: 视频文件不存在: {args.input}")
        sys.exit(1)

    if not os.path.exists(args.subtitle):
        print(f"错误: 字幕文件不存在: {args.subtitle}")
        sys.exit(1)

    # 确定输出路径
    if args.output:
        output_file = args.output
    elif args.output_dir:
        os.makedirs(args.output_dir, exist_ok=True)
        base_name = os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(args.input))[0]
        output_file = os.path.join(args.output_dir, f"{base_name}_subtitled.mp4")
    else:
        base_name = os.path.splitext(args.input)[0]
        output_file = f"{base_name}_subtitled.mp4"

    # 获取视频信息
    duration = get_video_duration(args.input)
    video_info = get_video_info(args.input)

    print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")
    print(f"  字幕合并视频工具")
    print(f"{'=' * 60}")
    print(f"输入视频: {os.path.basename(args.input)}")
    print(f"字幕文件: {os.path.basename(args.subtitle)}")
    if video_info:
        print(f"视频分辨率: {video_info['width']}x{video_info['height']}")
    if duration > 0:
        print(f"视频时长: {int(duration // 60)}分{int(duration % 60)}秒")
    print(f"字幕字号: {args.font_size}")
    print(f"字幕位置: {args.position}")
    print(f"编码质量: CRF {args.quality}")
    print(f"编码速度: {args.preset}")
    print(f"输出文件: {output_file}")
    print(f"{'=' * 60}")

    # 构建 FFmpeg 命令 - 简化路径处理
    subtitle_path = os.path.abspath(args.subtitle)
    input_path = os.path.abspath(args.input)

    # 字幕位置
    alignment = 2 if args.position == "bottom" else 6

    # 字幕样式
    style = f"FontSize={args.font_size},PrimaryColour=&H00FFFFFF,OutlineColour=&H00000000,Outline={args.outline},MarginV={args.margin},Alignment={alignment}"

    subtitle_filter = f"subtitles={subtitle_path}:force_style='{style}'"

    cmd = [
        "ffmpeg",
        "-i",
        input_path,
        "-vf",
        subtitle_filter,
        "-c:v",
        "libx264",
        "-preset",
        args.preset,
        "-crf",
        str(args.quality),
        "-c:a",
        "copy",
        "-y",
        output_file,
    ]

    print(f"\n开始合并...")
    start_time = time.time()

    # 运行 FFmpeg
    returncode = run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration)

    if returncode == 0:
        elapsed = time.time() - start_time
        output_size = os.path.getsize(output_file) / (1024 * 1024)  # MB

        print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")
        print(f"  完成!")
        print(f"  输出文件: {output_file}")
        print(f"  文件大小: {output_size:.1f} MB")
        print(f"  总耗时: {elapsed:.1f}秒 ({elapsed / 60:.1f}分钟)")
        print(f"{'=' * 60}")
    else:
        print(f"\n错误: FFmpeg 执行失败，返回码: {returncode}")
        print("请检查输入文件和字幕文件是否正确")
        sys.exit(1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
字幕合并视频工具
将 SRT 字幕硬编码到视频中，生成带字幕的新视频
"""

import argparse
import os
import sys
import subprocess
import time
import re


def get_video_info(video_path):
    """获取视频信息"""
    cmd = [
        "ffprobe",
        "-v",
        "error",
        "-select_streams",
        "v:0",
        "-show_entries",
        "stream=width,height,duration",
        "-of",
        "csv=p=0",
        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        parts = result.stdout.strip().split(",")
        if len(parts) >= 3:
            return {
                "width": int(parts[0]),
                "height": int(parts[1]),
                "duration": float(parts[2]) if parts[2] else 0,
            }
    except:
        pass
    return None


def get_video_duration(video_path):
    """获取视频时长"""
    cmd = [
        "ffprobe",
        "-v",
        "error",
        "-show_entries",
        "format=duration",
        "-of",
        "default=noprint_wrappers=1:nokey=1",
        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        return float(result.stdout.strip())
    except:
        return 0


def merge_subtitle(
    video_path,
    subtitle_path,
    output_path,
    font_size=24,
    font_color="white",
    outline_color="black",
    outline_width=2,
    position="bottom",
    margin_v=30,
):
    """
    合并字幕到视频

    Args:
        video_path: 输入视频路径
        subtitle_path: 字幕文件路径
        output_path: 输出视频路径
        font_size: 字体大小
        font_color: 字体颜色
        outline_color: 描边颜色
        outline_width: 描边宽度
        position: 字幕位置 (bottom/top)
        margin_v: 垂直边距
    """

    # 字幕位置
    alignment = (
        2 if position == "bottom" else 6
    )  # ASS alignment: 2=底部居中, 6=顶部居中

    # 构建 subtitles 滤镜
    # 使用绝对路径并转义特殊字符
    subtitle_path_escaped = subtitle_path.replace(":", "\\:").replace("'", "\\'")

    # 字幕样式
    style = f"FontSize={font_size},PrimaryColour=&H00FFFFFF,OutlineColour=&H00000000,Outline={outline_width},MarginV={margin_v},Alignment={alignment}"

    subtitle_filter = f"subtitles='{subtitle_path_escaped}':force_style='{style}'"

    # FFmpeg 命令
    cmd = [
        "ffmpeg",
        "-i",
        video_path,
        "-vf",
        subtitle_filter,
        "-c:v",
        "libx264",
        "-preset",
        "medium",
        "-crf",
        "23",
        "-c:a",
        "copy",
        "-y",  # 覆盖输出文件
        output_path,
    ]

    return cmd


def run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration, verbose=False):
    """运行 FFmpeg 并显示进度"""

    if verbose:
        # 详细模式：直接运行并显示 FFmpeg 输出
        process = subprocess.Popen(cmd, universal_newlines=True)
        for line in process.stdout:
            print(line, end="")
        for line in process.stderr:
            print(line, end="", file=sys.stderr)
        return process.wait()

    # 简单模式：只显示进度条
    print(f"\n开始合并...")
    process = subprocess.Popen(cmd, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE)
    process.wait()
    return process.returncode


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="字幕合并视频工具 - 将 SRT 字幕硬编码到视频中"
    )
    parser.add_argument("input", help="输入视频文件路径")
    parser.add_argument("-s", "--subtitle", required=True, help="SRT 字幕文件路径")
    parser.add_argument("-o", "--output", help="输出视频文件路径")

        "-d", "--dir", dest="output_dir", help="输出目录（默认: 与输入视频同目录）"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--font-size", type=int, default=24, help="字幕字体大小（默认: 24）"
    )
    parser.add_argument("--font-color", default="white", help="字幕颜色（默认: white）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--outline", type=int, default=2, help="字幕描边宽度（默认: 2）"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--position",
        default="bottom",
        choices=["bottom", "top"],
        help="字幕位置（默认: bottom）",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--margin", type=int, default=30, help="字幕边距（默认: 30）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "-q",
        "--quality",
        type=int,
        default=23,
        choices=range(18, 29),
        metavar="18-28",
        help="视频质量 CRF 值，越小质量越高（默认: 23）",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--preset",
        default="medium",
        choices=[
            "ultrafast",
            "superfast",
            "veryfast",
            "faster",
            "fast",
            "medium",
            "slow",
            "slower",
            "veryslow",
        ],
        help="编码速度预设（默认: medium）",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "-v", "--verbose", action="store_true", help="显示 FFmpeg 详细输出"
    )

    args = parser.parse_args()

    # 检查输入文件
    if not os.path.exists(args.input):
        print(f"错误: 视频文件不存在: {args.input}")
        sys.exit(1)

    if not os.path.exists(args.subtitle):
        print(f"错误: 字幕文件不存在: {args.subtitle}")
        sys.exit(1)

    # 确定输出路径
    if args.output:
        output_file = args.output
    elif args.output_dir:
        os.makedirs(args.output_dir, exist_ok=True)
        base_name = os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(args.input))[0]
        output_file = os.path.join(args.output_dir, f"{base_name}_subtitled.mp4")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
字幕合并视频工具
将 SRT 字幕硬编码到视频中，生成带字幕的新视频
"""

import argparse
import os
import sys
import subprocess
import time
import re


def get_video_info(video_path):
    """获取视频信息"""
    cmd = [
        "ffprobe",
        "-v",
        "error",
        "-select_streams",
        "v:0",
        "-show_entries",
        "stream=width,height,duration",
        "-of",
        "csv=p=0",
        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        parts = result.stdout.strip().split(",")
        if len(parts) >= 3:
            return {
                "width": int(parts[0]),
                "height": int(parts[1]),
                "duration": float(parts[2]) if parts[2] else 0,
            }
    except:
        pass
    return None


def get_video_duration(video_path):
    """获取视频时长"""
    cmd = [
        "ffprobe",
        "-v",
        "error",
        "-show_entries",
        "format=duration",
        "-of",
        "default=noprint_wrappers=1:nokey=1",
        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        return float(result.stdout.strip())
    except:
        return 0


def merge_subtitle(
    video_path,
    subtitle_path,
    output_path,
    font_size=24,
    font_color="white",
    outline_color="black",
    outline_width=2,
    position="bottom",
    margin_v=30,
):
    """
    合并字幕到视频

    Args:
        video_path: 输入视频路径
        subtitle_path: 字幕文件路径
        output_path: 输出视频路径
        font_size: 字体大小
        font_color: 字体颜色
        outline_color: 描边颜色
        outline_width: 描边宽度
        position: 字幕位置 (bottom/top)
        margin_v: 垂直边距
    """

    # 字幕位置
    alignment = (
        2 if position == "bottom" else 6
    )  # ASS alignment: 2=底部居中, 6=顶部居中

    # 构建 subtitles 滤镜
    # 使用绝对路径并转义特殊字符
    subtitle_path_escaped = subtitle_path.replace(":", "\\:").replace("'", "\\'")

    # 字幕样式
    style = f"FontSize={font_size},PrimaryColour=&H00FFFFFF,OutlineColour=&H00000000,Outline={outline_width},MarginV={margin_v},Alignment={alignment}"

    subtitle_filter = f"subtitles='{subtitle_path_escaped}':force_style='{style}'"

    # FFmpeg 命令
    cmd = [
        "ffmpeg",
        "-i",
        video_path,
        "-vf",
        subtitle_filter,
        "-c:v",
        "libx264",
        "-preset",
        "medium",
        "-crf",
        "23",
        "-c:a",
        "copy",
        "-y",  # 覆盖输出文件
        output_path,
    ]

    return cmd


def run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration, verbose=False):
    """运行 FFmpeg 并显示进度"""

    if verbose:
        # 详细模式：直接运行并显示 FFmpeg 输出
        process = subprocess.Popen(
            cmd,
            stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
            stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
            universal_newlines=True,
        )
        if process.stdout:
            for line in process.stdout:
                print(line, end="")
        return process.wait()

    # 简单模式：只显示进度条
    print(f"\n开始合并...")
    process = subprocess.Popen(cmd, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE)
    process.wait()
    return process.returncode


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="字幕合并视频工具 - 将 SRT 字幕硬编码到视频中"
    )
    parser.add_argument("input", help="输入视频文件路径")
    parser.add_argument("-s", "--subtitle", required=True, help="SRT 字幕文件路径")
    parser.add_argument("-o", "--output", help="输出视频文件路径")
    parser.add_argument(
        "-d", "--dir", dest="output_dir", help="输出目录（默认: 与输入视频同目录）"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--font-size", type=int, default=24, help="字幕字体大小（默认: 24）"
    )
    parser.add_argument("--font-color", default="white", help="字幕颜色（默认: white）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--outline", type=int, default=2, help="字幕描边宽度（默认: 2）"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--position",
        default="bottom",
        choices=["bottom", "top"],
        help="字幕位置（默认: bottom）",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--margin", type=int, default=30, help="字幕边距（默认: 30）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "-q",
        "--quality",
        type=int,
        default=23,
        choices=range(18, 29),
        metavar="18-28",
        help="视频质量 CRF 值，越小质量越高（默认: 23）",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--preset",
        default="medium",
        choices=[
            "ultrafast",
            "superfast",
            "veryfast",
            "faster",
            "fast",
            "medium",
            "slow",
            "slower",
            "veryslow",
        ],
        help="编码速度预设（默认: medium）",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "-v", "--verbose", action="store_true", help="显示 FFmpeg 详细输出"
    )

    args = parser.parse_args()

    # 检查输入文件
    if not os.path.exists(args.input):
        print(f"错误: 视频文件不存在: {args.input}")
        sys.exit(1)

    if not os.path.exists(args.subtitle):
        print(f"错误: 字幕文件不存在: {args.subtitle}")
        sys.exit(1)

    # 确定输出路径
    if args.output:
        output_file = args.output
    elif args.output_dir:
        os.makedirs(args.output_dir, exist_ok=True)
        base_name = os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(args.input))[0]
        output_file = os.path.join(args.output_dir, f"{base_name}_subtitled.mp4")
    else:
        base_name = os.path.splitext(args.input)[0]
        output_file = f"{base_name}_subtitled.mp4"

    # 获取视频信息
    duration = get_video_duration(args.input)
    video_info = get_video_info(args.input)

    print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")
    print(f"  字幕合并视频工具")
    print(f"{'=' * 60}")
    print(f"输入视频: {os.path.basename(args.input)}")
    print(f"字幕文件: {os.path.basename(args.subtitle)}")
    if video_info:
        print(f"视频分辨率: {video_info['width']}x{video_info['height']}")
    if duration > 0:
        print(f"视频时长: {int(duration // 60)}分{int(duration % 60)}秒")
    print(f"字幕字号: {args.font_size}")
    print(f"字幕位置: {args.position}")
    print(f"编码质量: CRF {args.quality}")
    print(f"编码速度: {args.preset}")
    print(f"输出文件: {output_file}")
    print(f"{'=' * 60}")

    # 构建 FFmpeg 命令 - 简化路径处理
    subtitle_path = os.path.abspath(args.subtitle)
    input_path = os.path.abspath(args.input)

    # 字幕位置
    alignment = 2 if args.position == "bottom" else 6

    # 字幕样式
    style = f"FontSize={args.font_size},PrimaryColour=&H00FFFFFF,OutlineColour=&H00000000,Outline={args.outline},MarginV={args.margin},Alignment={alignment}"

    subtitle_filter = f"subtitles={subtitle_path}:force_style='{style}'"

    cmd = [
        "ffmpeg",
        "-i",
        input_path,
        "-vf",
        subtitle_filter,
        "-c:v",
        "libx264",
        "-preset",
        args.preset,
        "-crf",
        str(args.quality),
        "-c:a",
        "copy",
        "-y",
        output_file,
    ]

    print(f"\n开始合并...")
    start_time = time.time()

    # 运行 FFmpeg
    returncode = run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration)

    if returncode == 0:
        elapsed = time.time() - start_time
        output_size = os.path.getsize(output_file) / (1024 * 1024)  # MB

        print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")
        print(f"  完成!")
        print(f"  输出文件: {output_file}")
        print(f"  文件大小: {output_size:.1f} MB")
        print(f"  总耗时: {elapsed:.1f}秒 ({elapsed / 60:.1f}分钟)")
        print(f"{'=' * 60}")
    else:
        print(f"\n错误: FFmpeg 执行失败，返回码: {returncode}")
        print("请检查输入文件和字幕文件是否正确")
        sys.exit(1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

让我生成一个正确的命令。

脚本本身是正确的。之前测试已成功生成视频。

## 问题原因

之前执行时可能用的是 WMV 文件（需要转换），或者 FFmpeg 执行失败。

```bash
python /Users/bryanchen/Documents/work/opencode/merge_subtitle.py "/Users/bryanchen/Documents/work/opencode/dsot-011.mp4" -s "/Users/bryanchen/Documents/work/opencode/dsot-011.srt" -d /Users/bryanchen/Documents/work/opencode --font-size 24 -v
```

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
字幕合并视频工具
将 SRT 字幕硬编码到视频中，生成带字幕的新视频
"""

import argparse
import os
import sys
import subprocess
import time
import re


def get_video_info(video_path):
    """获取视频信息"""
    cmd = [
        "ffprobe",
        "-v",
        "error",
        "-select_streams",
        "v:0",
        "-show_entries",
        "stream=width,height,duration",
        "-of",
        "csv=p=0",
        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        parts = result.stdout.strip().split(",")
        if len(parts) >= 3:
            return {
                "width": int(parts[0]),
                "height": int(parts[1]),
                "duration": float(parts[2]) if parts[2] else 0,
            }
    except:
        pass
    return None


def get_video_duration(video_path):
    """获取视频时长"""
    cmd = [
        "ffprobe",
        "-v",
        "error",
        "-show_entries",
        "format=duration",
        "-of",
        "default=noprint_wrappers=1:nokey=1",
        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        return float(result.stdout.strip())
    except:
        return 0


def merge_subtitle(
    video_path,
    subtitle_path,
    output_path,
    font_size=24,
    font_color="white",
    outline_color="black",
    outline_width=2,
    position="bottom",
    margin_v=30,
):
    """
    合并字幕到视频

    Args:
        video_path: 输入视频路径
        subtitle_path: 字幕文件路径
        output_path: 输出视频路径
        font_size: 字体大小
        font_color: 字体颜色
        outline_color: 描边颜色
        outline_width: 描边宽度
        position: 字幕位置 (bottom/top)
        margin_v: 垂直边距
    """

    # 字幕位置
    alignment = (
        2 if position == "bottom" else 6
    )  # ASS alignment: 2=底部居中, 6=顶部居中

    # 构建 subtitles 滤镜
    # 使用绝对路径并转义特殊字符
    subtitle_path_escaped = subtitle_path.replace(":", "\\:").replace("'", "\\'")

    # 字幕样式
    style = f"FontSize={font_size},PrimaryColour=&H00FFFFFF,OutlineColour=&H00000000,Outline={outline_width},MarginV={margin_v},Alignment={alignment}"

    subtitle_filter = f"subtitles='{subtitle_path_escaped}':force_style='{style}'"

    # FFmpeg 命令
    cmd = [
        "ffmpeg",
        "-i",
        video_path,
        "-vf",
        subtitle_filter,
        "-c:v",
        "libx264",
        "-preset",
        "medium",
        "-crf",
        "23",
        "-c:a",
        "copy",
        "-y",  # 覆盖输出文件
        output_path,
    ]

    return cmd


def run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration, verbose=False):
    """运行 FFmpeg 并显示进度"""

    if verbose:
        # 详细模式：直接运行并显示 FFmpeg 输出
        process = subprocess.Popen(
            cmd,
            stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
            stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
            universal_newlines=True,
        )
        if process.stdout:
            for line in process.stdout:
                print(line, end="")
        return process.wait()

    # 简单模式：只显示进度条
    print(f"\n开始合并...")
    process = subprocess.Popen(cmd, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE)
    process.wait()
    return process.returncode


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="字幕合并视频工具 - 将 SRT 字幕硬编码到视频中"
    )
    parser.add_argument("input", help="输入视频文件路径")
    parser.add_argument("-s", "--subtitle", required=True, help="SRT 字幕文件路径")
    parser.add_argument("-o", "--output", help="输出视频文件路径")
    parser.add_argument(
        "-d", "--dir", dest="output_dir", help="输出目录（默认: 与输入视频同目录）"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--font-size", type=int, default=24, help="字幕字体大小（默认: 24）"
    )
    parser.add_argument("--font-color", default="white", help="字幕颜色（默认: white）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--outline", type=int, default=2, help="字幕描边宽度（默认: 2）"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--position",
        default="bottom",
        choices=["bottom", "top"],
        help="字幕位置（默认: bottom）",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--margin", type=int, default=30, help="字幕边距（默认: 30）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "-q",
        "--quality",
        type=int,
        default=23,
        choices=range(18, 29),
        metavar="18-28",
        help="视频质量 CRF 值，越小质量越高（默认: 23）",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--preset",
        default="medium",
        choices=[
            "ultrafast",
            "superfast",
            "veryfast",
            "faster",
            "fast",
            "medium",
            "slow",
            "slower",
            "veryslow",
        ],
        help="编码速度预设（默认: medium）",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "-v", "--verbose", action="store_true", help="显示 FFmpeg 详细输出"
    )

    args = parser.parse_args()

    # 检查输入文件
    if not os.path.exists(args.input):
        print(f"错误: 视频文件不存在: {args.input}")
        sys.exit(1)

    if not os.path.exists(args.subtitle):
        print(f"错误: 字幕文件不存在: {args.subtitle}")
        sys.exit(1)

    # 确定输出路径
    if args.output:
        output_file = args.output
    elif args.output_dir:
        os.makedirs(args.output_dir, exist_ok=True)
        base_name = os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(args.input))[0]
        output_file = os.path.join(args.output_dir, f"{base_name}_subtitled.mp4")
    else:
        base_name = os.path.splitext(args.input)[0]
        output_file = f"{base_name}_subtitled.mp4"

    # 获取视频信息
    duration = get_video_duration(args.input)
    video_info = get_video_info(args.input)

    print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")
    print(f"  字幕合并视频工具")
    print(f"{'=' * 60}")
    print(f"输入视频: {os.path.basename(args.input)}")
    print(f"字幕文件: {os.path.basename(args.subtitle)}")
    if video_info:
        print(f"视频分辨率: {video_info['width']}x{video_info['height']}")
    if duration > 0:
        print(f"视频时长: {int(duration // 60)}分{int(duration % 60)}秒")
    print(f"字幕字号: {args.font_size}")
    print(f"字幕位置: {args.position}")
    print(f"编码质量: CRF {args.quality}")
    print(f"编码速度: {args.preset}")
    print(f"输出文件: {output_file}")
    print(f"{'=' * 60}")

    # 构建 FFmpeg 命令 - 简化路径处理
    subtitle_path = os.path.abspath(args.subtitle)
    input_path = os.path.abspath(args.input)

    # 字幕位置
    alignment = 2 if args.position == "bottom" else 6

    # 字幕样式
    style = f"FontSize={args.font_size},PrimaryColour=&H00FFFFFF,OutlineColour=&H00000000,Outline={args.outline},MarginV={args.margin},Alignment={alignment}"

    subtitle_filter = f"subtitles={subtitle_path}:force_style='{style}'"

    cmd = [
        "ffmpeg",
        "-i",
        input_path,
        "-vf",
        subtitle_filter,
        "-c:v",
        "libx264",
        "-preset",
        args.preset,
        "-crf",
        str(args.quality),
        "-c:a",
        "copy",
        "-y",
        output_file,
    ]

    print(f"\n开始合并...")
    start_time = time.time()

    # 运行 FFmpeg
    returncode = run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration, args.verbose)

    if returncode == 0:
        elapsed = time.time() - start_time
        output_size = os.path.getsize(output_file) / (1024 * 1024)  # MB

        print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")
        print(f"  完成!")
        print(f"  输出文件: {output_file}")
        print(f"  文件大小: {output_size:.1f} MB")
        print(f"  总耗时: {elapsed:.1f}秒 ({elapsed / 60:.1f}分钟)")
        print(f"{'=' * 60}")
    else:
        print(f"\n错误: FFmpeg 执行失败，返回码: {returncode}")
        print("请检查输入文件和字幕文件是否正确")
        sys.exit(1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

    # 运行 FFmpeg
    returncode = run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration, args.verbose)

    if returncode == 0:
        elapsed = time.time() - start_time
        output_size = os.path.getsize(output_file) / (1024 * 1024)  # MB

        print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")
        print(f"  完成!")
        print(f"  输出文件: {output_file}")
        print(f"  文件大小: {output_size:.1f} MB")
        print(f"  总耗时: {elapsed:.1f}秒 ({elapsed / 60:.1f}分钟)")
        print(f"{'=' * 60}")
    else:
        print(f"\n错误: FFmpeg 执行失败，返回码: {returncode}")
        print("请检查输入文件和字幕文件是否正确")
        sys.exit(1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

But, the black screen issue with `merge_subtitle.py` is the top priority; I need to ensure it's addressed by the next agent.

I'm now zeroing in on the black screen issue. It seems the `-map 0:v` in `merge_subtitle.py` might be the root cause. This likely disrupts the filter chain. The FFmpeg logs confirm video data is being dropped. I'm contemplating how to best correct the command to ensure the video stream is correctly merged with subtitles.


**Diagnosing the Root Cause**

I've been meticulously examining the FFmpeg logs and the video files involved. The initial problem was the black screen after subtitle merging. It seems the problem originates from the WMV to MP4 conversion, where using `-c copy` with the VC-1 video format resulted in broken timestamps. This causes the libx264 encoder to drop most of the frames during the re-encoding step in `merge_subtitle.py`. The key to the solution lies in handling the conversion step more carefully.


**Identifying the Core Problem**

I'm now identifying the cause of the black screen. After careful examination of FFmpeg logs and the video, it's clear the issue lies in the conversion from WMV to MP4. Using `-c copy` with the VC-1 video format resulted in broken timestamps in the MP4, causing FFmpeg to drop frames during the subtitle merging step. This is the crucial information for the next action.


**Refining the Solution**

I'm now formulating a plan to address the broken timestamps issue. Since the problem stems from the initial WMV-to-MP4 conversion using `-c copy` on a VC-1 stream, the simplest approach might be to re-encode the video during conversion, or to repair the timestamps if possible during merging. I'm exploring different FFmpeg options for the next action.


**Identifying the Core Issue**

I've homed in on the primary culprit for the black screen: a broken MP4 file. The problematic `dsot-011.mp4` was created via `-c copy` from a WMV file containing VC-1 video. This resulted in corrupted timestamps, causing the subtitle merging script, `merge_subtitle.py`, to drop the video frames during re-encoding. This is the crucial finding for the next step.

---
## Goal

Develop a complete suite of Python tools and a Web UI for generating, translating, and hardcoding subtitles into videos using Whisper and FFmpeg. The immediate current goal is to fix a bug in the subtitle merging script (`merge_subtitle.py`) where the generated output video results in a black screen (only 2 frames encoded).

## Instructions

- Investigate and fix the black screen issue in `merge_subtitle.py`.
- Maintain the user's preferred subtitle styles for hardcoding: White text, Bottom position, Outline=2, Margin=30.
- Output format for merged videos must remain `.mp4`.
- Maintain support for both CLI operations and the Gradio-based Web UI (`webui.py`).

## Discoveries

- **Dependency conflicts:** Gradio 6.x and newer `huggingface_hub` versions caused `ImportError` and proxy issues. This was resolved by pinning `gradio==4.44.0` and `huggingface_hub==0.24.0` in `requirements.txt`.
- **Black Screen Root Cause:** The user recently tested the merge script using `dsot-011.mp4`, which was converted from `dsot-011.wmv` using `ffmpeg -c copy`. Because the source was a VC-1 stream, copying it directly into an MP4 container broke the PTS/DTS timestamps (FFmpeg logs showed `pts has no value` and `Non-monotonous DTS`).
- When `merge_subtitle.py` processes this broken MP4 with the `-vf subtitles=...` filter, `libx264` drops almost all frames (encoding only 2 frames, resulting in a 7kB video stream for a 1h44m video). The script needs a way to handle broken timestamps (e.g., adding `-async 1` or `-vsync 1` or avoiding `-c copy` during the initial wmv->mp4 conversion).

## Accomplished

- **Completed:** Built `whisper_subtitle.py` (Base), `whisper_subtitle_gpu.py` (GPU), `whisper_subtitle_turbo.py` (large-v3-turbo + batch translation), and `whisper_subtitle_pro.py` (local MT5 translation).
- **Completed:** Developed a Gradio Web UI (`webui.py`) integrating all generation, translation, and merging features.
- **Completed:** Written comprehensive documentation in `README.md` and configured `requirements.txt`.
- **In Progress:** Debugging `merge_subtitle.py` to correctly hardcode subtitles without dropping video frames (fixing the black screen issue on timestamp-corrupted source videos).
- **Left:** Fix the FFmpeg command in `merge_subtitle.py` to handle the frame dropping/black screen issue, and verify it works with the user's specific test files.

## Relevant files / directories

- `/Users/bryanchen/Documents/work/opencode/`: Main project directory.
- `/Users/bryanchen/Documents/work/opencode/merge_subtitle.py`: The subtitle merging script currently producing black screens. Needs FFmpeg command adjustments.
- `/Users/bryanchen/Documents/work/opencode/webui.py`: The Gradio Web UI script.
- `/Users/bryanchen/Documents/work/opencode/requirements.txt`: Project dependencies.
- `/Users/bryanchen/Documents/work/opencode/README.md`: Project documentation.
- `/Users/bryanchen/Documents/图片/dsot-011.wmv` & `/Users/bryanchen/Documents/work/opencode/dsot-011.mp4`: The test video files causing the timestamp/frame-drop issues.

parts.text:
**Formulating the next action**

\n\n

I'm now focused on figuring out the next step. I'm considering what information I need to gather to proceed effectively. The goal is clear, and I'm analyzing the data I have available, and determining how to proceed. I'm focusing on the plan's next stage.


**Assessing current status**

\n\n

My current focus is on summarizing the steps taken so far, in response to the user's questions. I'm compiling a list of all the scripts created. Then, I plan to analyze the user's report about the black screen and then propose a plan for debugging.


**Proposing the solution**

\n\n

My current focus is on formulating a plan to resolve the black screen issue. I'm analyzing the root cause, which seems to be related to the video's timestamp data. I'm preparing to modify the relevant script to include a specific filter that will allow the subtitles to work, even with potential timestamp errors. I am ready to propose my solution.


**Devising a practical course**

\n\n

My primary focus is now on determining the steps to resolve the black screen problem. I'm focusing on the plan to address the corrupted timestamps, and I am ready to implement the ffmpeg modifications, as outlined in the proposal. After the user's approval, I will proceed to the next stage.

我们目前的进展和面临的问题总结如下：

### 📈 我们已经完成了什么 (What did we do so far?)
1. **开发了多版本字幕生成工具**：
   - `whisper_subtitle.py` (基础版)
   - `whisper_subtitle_gpu.py` (GPU加速版)
   - `whisper_subtitle_turbo.py` (Turbo极速版 + 批量翻译)
   - `whisper_subtitle_pro.py` (本地大模型离线翻译版)
2. **开发了视频合并工具**：
   - `merge_subtitle.py` (使用 FFmpeg 将字幕硬编码烧录进视频)
3. **开发了可视化交互界面**：
   - `webui.py` (基于 Gradio 的完整网页 UI，支持一键处理)
4. **完善了项目配置**：
   - 编写了详尽的 `README.md` 和 `requirements.txt`。

---

### 🐛 关于“生成的视频是黑屏”的问题分析
我们刚才通过日志发现，当你转换 `dsot-011.wmv` 到 MP4 或者直接处理某些视频时，**视频只有声音，画面是黑屏（或者画面卡在第一帧）**。

**原因所在**：
这是因为源视频文件（特别是从 WMV 格式转换过来的）**丢失了正确的时间戳 (PTS/DTS)**。当 FFmpeg 尝试给没有时间戳的视频添加字幕滤镜 (`-vf subtitles=...`) 时，它不知道该在什么时间显示画面，导致它**丢弃了几乎所有的画面帧**（我们在日志里看到 1 个多小时的视频，它只编码了 2 帧画面）。

---

### 🛠️ 修复计划 (等待你的同意)
目前我处于只读模式（不能直接修改文件）。为了彻底解决黑屏问题，我计划修改 `merge_subtitle.py` 和 `webui.py` 中的 FFmpeg 命令，加入时间戳修复机制：

1. **重新生成时间戳**：在输入文件前添加 `-fflags +genpts` 参数。
2. **强制重置时间线**：在滤镜中添加 `setpts=PTS-STARTPTS`（即 `-vf "setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,subtitles=..."`），让视频帧严格按顺序排列，防止 FFmpeg 丢帧。
3. **强制帧率同步**：添加 `-fps_mode auto`，防止异常的跳帧。

只要你回复“**同意执行**”或“**开始修复**”，我就会解除只读模式，立即为你修复脚本，确保所有视频都能正常合成出带画面的字幕视频！
开始修复
开始修复

filediff.before:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
字幕合并视频工具
将 SRT 字幕硬编码到视频中，生成带字幕的新视频
"""

import argparse
import os
import sys
import subprocess
import time
import re


def get_video_info(video_path):
    """获取视频信息"""
    cmd = [
        "ffprobe",
        "-v",
        "error",
        "-select_streams",
        "v:0",
        "-show_entries",
        "stream=width,height,duration",
        "-of",
        "csv=p=0",
        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        parts = result.stdout.strip().split(",")
        if len(parts) >= 3:
            return {
                "width": int(parts[0]),
                "height": int(parts[1]),
                "duration": float(parts[2]) if parts[2] else 0,
            }
    except:
        pass
    return None


def get_video_duration(video_path):
    """获取视频时长"""
    cmd = [
        "ffprobe",
        "-v",
        "error",
        "-show_entries",
        "format=duration",
        "-of",
        "default=noprint_wrappers=1:nokey=1",
        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        return float(result.stdout.strip())
    except:
        return 0


def merge_subtitle(
    video_path,
    subtitle_path,
    output_path,
    font_size=24,
    font_color="white",
    outline_color="black",
    outline_width=2,
    position="bottom",
    margin_v=30,
):
    """
    合并字幕到视频

    Args:
        video_path: 输入视频路径
        subtitle_path: 字幕文件路径
        output_path: 输出视频路径
        font_size: 字体大小
        font_color: 字体颜色
        outline_color: 描边颜色
        outline_width: 描边宽度
        position: 字幕位置 (bottom/top)
        margin_v: 垂直边距
    """

    # 字幕位置
    alignment = (
        2 if position == "bottom" else 6
    )  # ASS alignment: 2=底部居中, 6=顶部居中

    # 构建 subtitles 滤镜
    # 使用绝对路径并转义特殊字符
    subtitle_path_escaped = subtitle_path.replace(":", "\\:").replace("'", "\\'")

    # 字幕样式
    style = f"FontSize={font_size},PrimaryColour=&H00FFFFFF,OutlineColour=&H00000000,Outline={outline_width},MarginV={margin_v},Alignment={alignment}"

    subtitle_filter = f"subtitles='{subtitle_path_escaped}':force_style='{style}'"

    # FFmpeg 命令
    cmd = [
        "ffmpeg",
        "-i",
        video_path,
        "-vf",
        subtitle_filter,
        "-c:v",
        "libx264",
        "-preset",
        "medium",
        "-crf",
        "23",
        "-c:a",
        "copy",
        "-y",  # 覆盖输出文件
        output_path,
    ]

    return cmd


def run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration, verbose=False):
    """运行 FFmpeg 并显示进度"""

    if verbose:
        # 详细模式：直接运行并显示 FFmpeg 输出
        process = subprocess.Popen(
            cmd,
            stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
            stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
            universal_newlines=True,
        )
        if process.stdout:
            for line in process.stdout:
                print(line, end="")
        return process.wait()

    # 简单模式：只显示进度条
    print(f"\n开始合并...")
    process = subprocess.Popen(cmd, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE)
    process.wait()
    return process.returncode


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="字幕合并视频工具 - 将 SRT 字幕硬编码到视频中"
    )
    parser.add_argument("input", help="输入视频文件路径")
    parser.add_argument("-s", "--subtitle", required=True, help="SRT 字幕文件路径")
    parser.add_argument("-o", "--output", help="输出视频文件路径")
    parser.add_argument(
        "-d", "--dir", dest="output_dir", help="输出目录（默认: 与输入视频同目录）"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--font-size", type=int, default=24, help="字幕字体大小（默认: 24）"
    )
    parser.add_argument("--font-color", default="white", help="字幕颜色（默认: white）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--outline", type=int, default=2, help="字幕描边宽度（默认: 2）"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--position",
        default="bottom",
        choices=["bottom", "top"],
        help="字幕位置（默认: bottom）",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--margin", type=int, default=30, help="字幕边距（默认: 30）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "-q",
        "--quality",
        type=int,
        default=23,
        choices=range(18, 29),
        metavar="18-28",
        help="视频质量 CRF 值，越小质量越高（默认: 23）",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--preset",
        default="medium",
        choices=[
            "ultrafast",
            "superfast",
            "veryfast",
            "faster",
            "fast",
            "medium",
            "slow",
            "slower",
            "veryslow",
        ],
        help="编码速度预设（默认: medium）",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "-v", "--verbose", action="store_true", help="显示 FFmpeg 详细输出"
    )

    args = parser.parse_args()

    # 检查输入文件
    if not os.path.exists(args.input):
        print(f"错误: 视频文件不存在: {args.input}")
        sys.exit(1)

    if not os.path.exists(args.subtitle):
        print(f"错误: 字幕文件不存在: {args.subtitle}")
        sys.exit(1)

    # 确定输出路径
    if args.output:
        output_file = args.output
    elif args.output_dir:
        os.makedirs(args.output_dir, exist_ok=True)
        base_name = os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(args.input))[0]
        output_file = os.path.join(args.output_dir, f"{base_name}_subtitled.mp4")
    else:
        base_name = os.path.splitext(args.input)[0]
        output_file = f"{base_name}_subtitled.mp4"

    # 获取视频信息
    duration = get_video_duration(args.input)
    video_info = get_video_info(args.input)

    print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")
    print(f"  字幕合并视频工具")
    print(f"{'=' * 60}")
    print(f"输入视频: {os.path.basename(args.input)}")
    print(f"字幕文件: {os.path.basename(args.subtitle)}")
    if video_info:
        print(f"视频分辨率: {video_info['width']}x{video_info['height']}")
    if duration > 0:
        print(f"视频时长: {int(duration // 60)}分{int(duration % 60)}秒")
    print(f"字幕字号: {args.font_size}")
    print(f"字幕位置: {args.position}")
    print(f"编码质量: CRF {args.quality}")
    print(f"编码速度: {args.preset}")
    print(f"输出文件: {output_file}")
    print(f"{'=' * 60}")

    # 构建 FFmpeg 命令 - 简化路径处理
    subtitle_path = os.path.abspath(args.subtitle)
    input_path = os.path.abspath(args.input)

    # 字幕位置
    alignment = 2 if args.position == "bottom" else 6

    # 字幕样式
    style = f"FontSize={args.font_size},PrimaryColour=&H00FFFFFF,OutlineColour=&H00000000,Outline={args.outline},MarginV={args.margin},Alignment={alignment}"

    subtitle_filter = f"subtitles={subtitle_path}:force_style='{style}'"

    cmd = [
        "ffmpeg",
        "-y",
        "-i",
        input_path,
        "-vf",
        subtitle_filter,
        "-c:v",
        "libx264",
        "-preset",
        args.preset,
        "-crf",
        str(args.quality),
        "-c:a",
        "aac",
        "-b:a",
        "128k",
        "-map",
        "0:v",
        "-map",
        "0:a?",
        output_file,
    ]

    print(f"\n开始合并...")
    start_time = time.time()

    # 运行 FFmpeg
    returncode = run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration, args.verbose)

    if returncode == 0:
        elapsed = time.time() - start_time
        output_size = os.path.getsize(output_file) / (1024 * 1024)  # MB

        print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")
        print(f"  完成!")
        print(f"  输出文件: {output_file}")
        print(f"  文件大小: {output_size:.1f} MB")
        print(f"  总耗时: {elapsed:.1f}秒 ({elapsed / 60:.1f}分钟)")
        print(f"{'=' * 60}")
    else:
        print(f"\n错误: FFmpeg 执行失败，返回码: {returncode}")
        print("请检查输入文件和字幕文件是否正确")
        sys.exit(1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        parts = result.stdout.strip().split(",")
        if len(parts) >= 3:
            return {
                "width": int(parts[0]),
                "height": int(parts[1]),
                "duration": float(parts[2]) if parts[2] else 0,
            }
    except:
        pass
    return None


def get_video_duration(video_path):
    """获取视频时长"""
    cmd = [
        "ffprobe",
        "-v",
        "error",
        "-show_entries",
        "format=duration",
        "-of",
        "default=noprint_wrappers=1:nokey=1",
        video_path,
    ]
    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
        return float(result.stdout.strip())
    except:
        return 0


def merge_subtitle(
    video_path,
    subtitle_path,
    output_path,
    font_size=24,
    font_color="white",
    outline_color="black",
    outline_width=2,
    position="bottom",
    margin_v=30,
):
    """
    合并字幕到视频

    Args:
        video_path: 输入视频路径
        subtitle_path: 字幕文件路径
        output_path: 输出视频路径
        font_size: 字体大小
        font_color: 字体颜色
        outline_color: 描边颜色
        outline_width: 描边宽度
        position: 字幕位置 (bottom/top)
        margin_v: 垂直边距
    """

    # 字幕位置
    alignment = (
        2 if position == "bottom" else 6
    )  # ASS alignment: 2=底部居中, 6=顶部居中

    # 构建 subtitles 滤镜
    # 使用绝对路径并转义特殊字符
    subtitle_path_escaped = subtitle_path.replace(":", "\\:").replace("'", "\\'")

    # 字幕样式
    style = f"FontSize={font_size},PrimaryColour=&H00FFFFFF,OutlineColour=&H00000000,Outline={outline_width},MarginV={margin_v},Alignment={alignment}"

    subtitle_filter = f"subtitles='{subtitle_path_escaped}':force_style='{style}'"

    # FFmpeg 命令
    cmd = [
        "ffmpeg",
        "-i",
        video_path,
        "-vf",
        subtitle_filter,
        "-c:v",
        "libx264",
        "-preset",
        "medium",
        "-crf",
        "23",
        "-c:a",
        "copy",
        "-y",  # 覆盖输出文件
        output_path,
    ]

    return cmd


def run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration, verbose=False):
    """运行 FFmpeg 并显示进度"""

    if verbose:
        # 详细模式：直接运行并显示 FFmpeg 输出
        process = subprocess.Popen(
            cmd,
            stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
            stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
            universal_newlines=True,
        )
        if process.stdout:
            for line in process.stdout:
                print(line, end="")
        return process.wait()

    # 简单模式：只显示进度条
    print(f"\n开始合并...")
    process = subprocess.Popen(cmd, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE)
    process.wait()
    return process.returncode


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="字幕合并视频工具 - 将 SRT 字幕硬编码到视频中"
    )
    parser.add_argument("input", help="输入视频文件路径")
    parser.add_argument("-s", "--subtitle", required=True, help="SRT 字幕文件路径")
    parser.add_argument("-o", "--output", help="输出视频文件路径")
    parser.add_argument(
        "-d", "--dir", dest="output_dir", help="输出目录（默认: 与输入视频同目录）"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--font-size", type=int, default=24, help="字幕字体大小（默认: 24）"
    )
    parser.add_argument("--font-color", default="white", help="字幕颜色（默认: white）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--outline", type=int, default=2, help="字幕描边宽度（默认: 2）"
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--position",
        default="bottom",
        choices=["bottom", "top"],
        help="字幕位置（默认: bottom）",
    )
    parser.add_argument("--margin", type=int, default=30, help="字幕边距（默认: 30）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "-q",
        "--quality",
        type=int,
        default=23,
        choices=range(18, 29),
        metavar="18-28",
        help="视频质量 CRF 值，越小质量越高（默认: 23）",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--preset",
        default="medium",
        choices=[
            "ultrafast",
            "superfast",
            "veryfast",
            "faster",
            "fast",
            "medium",
            "slow",
            "slower",
            "veryslow",
        ],
        help="编码速度预设（默认: medium）",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "-v", "--verbose", action="store_true", help="显示 FFmpeg 详细输出"
    )

    args = parser.parse_args()

    # 检查输入文件
    if not os.path.exists(args.input):
        print(f"错误: 视频文件不存在: {args.input}")
        sys.exit(1)

    if not os.path.exists(args.subtitle):
        print(f"错误: 字幕文件不存在: {args.subtitle}")
        sys.exit(1)

    # 确定输出路径
    if args.output:
        output_file = args.output
    elif args.output_dir:
        os.makedirs(args.output_dir, exist_ok=True)
        base_name = os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(args.input))[0]
        output_file = os.path.join(args.output_dir, f"{base_name}_subtitled.mp4")
    else:
        base_name = os.path.splitext(args.input)[0]
        output_file = f"{base_name}_subtitled.mp4"

    # 获取视频信息
    duration = get_video_duration(args.input)
    video_info = get_video_info(args.input)

    print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")
    print(f"  字幕合并视频工具")
    print(f"{'=' * 60}")
    print(f"输入视频: {os.path.basename(args.input)}")
    print(f"字幕文件: {os.path.basename(args.subtitle)}")
    if video_info:
        print(f"视频分辨率: {video_info['width']}x{video_info['height']}")
    if duration > 0:
        print(f"视频时长: {int(duration // 60)}分{int(duration % 60)}秒")
    print(f"字幕字号: {args.font_size}")
    print(f"字幕位置: {args.position}")
    print(f"编码质量: CRF {args.quality}")
    print(f"编码速度: {args.preset}")
    print(f"输出文件: {output_file}")
    print(f"{'=' * 60}")

    # 构建 FFmpeg 命令 - 简化路径处理
    subtitle_path = os.path.abspath(args.subtitle)
    input_path = os.path.abspath(args.input)

    # 字幕位置
    alignment = 2 if args.position == "bottom" else 6

    # 字幕样式
    style = f"FontSize={args.font_size},PrimaryColour=&H00FFFFFF,OutlineColour=&H00000000,Outline={args.outline},MarginV={args.margin},Alignment={alignment}"

    # 添加 setpts=PTS-STARTPTS 修复时间戳问题，防止因为时间戳错误导致画面黑屏丢帧
    subtitle_filter = (
        f"setpts=PTS-STARTPTS,subtitles={subtitle_path}:force_style='{style}'"
    )

    cmd = [
        "ffmpeg",
        "-y",
        "-fflags",
        "+genpts",  # 重新生成时间戳
        "-i",
        input_path,
        "-vf",
        subtitle_filter,
        "-c:v",
        "libx264",
        "-preset",
        args.preset,
        "-crf",
        str(args.quality),
        "-fps_mode",
        "auto",  # 防止异常丢帧
        "-c:a",
        "aac",
        "-b:a",
        "128k",
        "-map",
        "0:v",
        "-map",
        "0:a?",
        output_file,
    ]

    print(f"\n开始合并...")
    start_time = time.time()

    # 运行 FFmpeg
    returncode = run_ffmpeg_with_progress(cmd, duration, args.verbose)

    if returncode == 0:
        elapsed = time.time() - start_time
        output_size = os.path.getsize(output_file) / (1024 * 1024)  # MB

        print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")
        print(f"  完成!")
        print(f"  输出文件: {output_file}")
        print(f"  文件大小: {output_size:.1f} MB")
        print(f"  总耗时: {elapsed:.1f}秒 ({elapsed / 60:.1f}分钟)")
        print(f"{'=' * 60}")
    else:
        print(f"\n错误: FFmpeg 执行失败，返回码: {returncode}")
        print("请检查输入文件和字幕文件是否正确")
        sys.exit(1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
